text: Planning a trip is one of the most exciting parts of traveling. Last year, I spent weeks researching my destination, booking flights, and choosing unique places to stay. When I finally arrived, I was amazed by the new culture—the colorful markets, different customs, and the way people greeted each other. Trying local food was a highlight; I tasted dishes I had never heard of, from spicy street snacks to sweet desserts. Language barriers made things challenging, especially when ordering food or asking for directions, but hand gestures and smiles helped a lot. Now, looking back, the memories of those experiences are priceless—they taught me so much about the world and myself.
